headline: OpenAI's Sam Altman takes the stand in trial against Elon Musk
summary: OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman took the stand on Tuesday to face questioning in the lawsuit filed by Elon Musk's attorneys over whether the AI developer breached the original non-profit mission it was founded on. Both Altman and Musk are both co-founders of OpenAI. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley reports on the latest testimonies out of this high-profile Silicon Valley trial.

headline: There was a ‘morale boost’ when Elon Musk left OpenAI, Sam Altman testifies
summary: OpenAI’s cofounders once asked Elon Musk, who helped create and fund the company, an important question: If he were to control OpenAI, what would happen to the company on his death? Musk responded that he hadn’t thought about it much and that he might pass it on to his children.

The rally is driven by surging demand and a shortage of high-bandwidth memory, the specialized chips that sit alongside AI accelerators in data centers. This is an industry-first offering designed to help Microsoft partners preemptively respond to major upcoming changes in Microsoft's support ecosystem.

headline: TikTok challenges EU 'gatekeeper' status at Europe's top court
summary: Bytedance's social media platform TikTok on Tuesday made a last- ditch attempt at Europe's top court to scrap its ‌designation as a "gatekeeper" under EU rules, which require it to meet tougher standards ‌as regulators seek to curb the power of Big Tech.  The case--the first EU Digital Markets Act "gatekeeper" challenge heard by ​the EU Court of Justice--could bolster or weaken Europe's attempt to rein in Big Tech to ensure competition and more choice for users.

headline: Why JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF Limits Upside While JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Income ETF Sacrifices Growth for 11.98% Yields

headline: OpenAI to cap Microsoft revenue-sharing at $38 billion, The Information reports
summary: OpenAI's ‌revenue-sharing ‌payments to ​Microsoft are now capped at $38 ‌billion, ⁠The Information ⁠reported on ​Monday, ​citing ​a ‌person with knowledge of the arrangement. Reuters ‌could ​not ​immediately ​verify ‌the report.
